acceptance_criteria.criterion: All enum values match the schema reference document exactly
Root index schema successfully parses a valid project-ledger.json fixture
Work package detail schema successfully parses a valid ledger/WP-###.json fixture
Schemas reject malformed input (missing required fields, invalid enum values, wrong types)
isValidStatusTransition accepts all 6 legal transitions and rejects illegal ones
canStartWorkPackage returns allowed: false when any dependency WP is not COMPLETE
canCompleteWorkPackage returns allowed: false with list of unmet criteria when any criterion has met: false

summary: Created src/schema/enums.ts with all required enum definitions matching the schema reference
Implemented src/schema/work-package.ts with complete Zod schemas for WP detail files
Implemented src/schema/root-index.ts with complete Zod schemas for project-ledger.json
Created src/schema/validators.ts with status transition, dependency, and completion validators
Verified all schemas parse real ledger files correctly
Tested all 6 legal status transitions and confirmed illegal transitions are rejected

comments.note: No observations — schemas precisely match the authoritative schema reference document. All enum values, field names, and validation rules are consistent. The use of .passthrough() on MetricsSchema allows future extensibility for custom metrics.

summary: Verified all enum definitions match project-ledger-schema.md exactly
Confirmed RootIndexSchema and WorkPackageDetailSchema parse valid fixtures correctly
Validated schemas reject malformed data with descriptive Zod errors
Tested isValidStatusTransition function against all 6 legal transitions plus several illegal ones
Verified canStartWorkPackage correctly rejects when dependencies not COMPLETE
Verified canCompleteWorkPackage correctly identifies unmet acceptance criteria
Schemas are correctly exported and importable
